name: Apple Crumb Cake (Mrs.entemann's)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet.
2. Pare, core, and slice apples to 1/2-inch pieces.
3. Add apples to butter and cook, stirring, for 8 minutes until tender.
4. Stir in sugar, lemon peel, cinnamon, mace, and currants. Cook for 15 minutes, stirring until thickened. Cool.
5. In a large bowl, combine 1 cup flour, sugar, salt, and yeast.
6. In a small saucepan, combine water and butter. Heat on low flame to 120°F.
7. Gradually add the warm butter mixture to the dry ingredients. Beat for 2 minutes.
8. Beat in egg, lemon peel, and 3/4 cup flour. Mix until well combined.
9. Add the remaining flour and mix until just combined. Cover and let rest for 20 minutes.
10. Grease two baking sheets.
11. Place half the dough on a well-floured work surface and roll to 14" x 12".
12. Place the rolled dough on one sheet.
13. Spread about 3/4-inch of filling lengthwise down the center of the dough.
14. Starting about 3/4-inch from the filling, cut 1-inch wide diagonal strips from the filling to the edges of the dough.
15. Alternately fold opposite strips of dough at angles across the filling.
16. Fold the ends over the filling.
17. Brush a large piece of waxed paper with vegetable oil.
18. Loosely cover the sheet with plastic wrap.
19. Refrigerate for 2 hours.
20. Uncover and let stand at room temperature for 10 minutes.
21. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
22. Combine the remaining ingredients for topping.
23. Sprinkle over the loaves.
24. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until lightly browned. Remove from the sheet and cool.
